blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 242 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
